div.h1: Cross-Domain: Command Buffers as Event Sourcing

ul.li: Index: Unique identifier within a generation. Max: 1,099,511,627,775 entities.
Generation: Incremented on despawn to prevent "ABA" dangling pointer issues.
Flags: [7:4] reserved for versioning, [3:0] entity archetype classification.

div.p: Delta Sync Serialize the Buffer instead of the whole World state.
Bug Reproduction Record user commands + seeds. Re-run for bit-perfect failure.
Command Inversion Store 'inverse' commands. e.g., Add becomes Remove.
